title: GT_Theory — Empirical validation pipeline for coupled thermal-hydraulic continental subsurface dynamics
description: Software accompanying the manuscript on integrated interface dynamics (LSAI/SWRI/CMI) and the nine dimensionless numbers that partition the continental subsurface into predicted regimes. Implements 1-D finite-volume and Crank–Nicolson forward solvers with freeze–thaw phase change, hierarchical Bayesian inversion of borehole temperature profiles, and six empirical fingerprints against a global borehole archive.
